name: New England Clam Chowder No. 636
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a large, heavy saucepan.
2. Yields 4 Servings.
3. Saute the bacon until crisp.
4. Add the green onions and potatoes to the saucepan.
5. Continue sauteing for a few minutes.
6. Sprinkle with flour.
7. Add milk and stir to blend.
8. Bring to a boil.
9. Simmer, stirring until the potatoes are tender (approximately 20 minutes).
10. Stir in salt and pepper.
11. Add the clams with their liquid.
12. Add the whipping cream.
13. Heat the soup, stirring just until it is simmering.
14. Do not boil or the clams will toughen.
15. Sprinkle with parsley and basil leaves before serving.
